gaps.gap: JD is severely incomplete (fetched content is corrupted HTML/JavaScript fragments with no readable job description text, responsibilities, or requirements)
gaps.mitigation: Request clean, readable JD text to assess specific scope, reporting line, years required, management expectations, and performance metrics. Candidate fit cannot be precisely judged without clear requirements.

gaps.gap: No visibility into whether role is IC, manager, or manager-of-managers scope; no clarity on team size or direct reports
gaps.mitigation: Clarify role level, management scope, and org reporting structure. Candidate targets L4–L5 (Manager/Senior Manager/Lead/Principal); role placement relative to that band is critical.

gaps.gap: No explicit statement of years of experience required, seniority band, or company context (startup vs. scale-up vs. enterprise)
gaps.mitigation: Infer L5 from title and Google commercial function context, but confidence is limited. Candidate's eight years of tenure and two promotions at Google suggest strong fit at that level if role is truly L5-equivalent.

gaps.gap: Limited evidence of deep consulting brand or structured case-team experience typical of some S&O roles
gaps.mitigation: Candidate's strength is in hands-on transformation and scaling; if role prioritizes frameworks or consulting-style projects, clarify fit. Operations and execution focus are her demonstrated strengths.

output.level_rationale: Posted role title is "Commercial Strategy & Operations" in Google's Strategy & Operations department, multi-geography scope (Sydney/Singapore/London). Typical S&O roles at Google in this function for L5 reflect 6–9 years required experience, established ownership of commercial or transformation programs, and cross-regional coordination. JD is corrupted and unreadable; confidence is lowered due to missing explicit requirements, reporting line, and scope detail.
output.summary: Candidate is a strong fit for Commercial Strategy & Operations at Google given eight years in Google Devices and Services with two promotions, direct experience scaling global commercial operations and transformation programs, and positioning in core target role families (Strategy & Operations, Business Operations, Product Operations, GTM/Sales Strategy, Business Transformation). However, the fetched JD is corrupted and unreadable, preventing clarity on specific scope, management expectations, reporting line, and required years. Role is estimated L5 based on title and multi-geography commercial function context, aligning well with candidate's target band, but confidence is moderate pending clean JD review.
uncertainties: JD content is heavily corrupted (JavaScript, HTML fragments, cache headers); no readable responsibilities, scope, or explicit requirements are visible
